instance_reference.note: Cloud TPU bills per chip-hour directly; no instance-level division needed.

price_note: LIST PRICES from the official Cloud TPU pricing page (per chip-hour). reserved_1y is the 1-year committed-use discount rate; spot is the DWS Flex-start price used as the preemptible/spot reference. Prices vary by region; base-region figures used.
energy_note: Google does not publish TPU v5e power consumption or TDP (IEA 4E server-efficiency study: only performance data available for v5e/v5p). tdp_watts is therefore null and the electricity sub-term is NOT modeled for this target. PUE 1.10 is Google's published fleet average.

prices.derivation: Official Cloud TPU list price per chip-hour, v5e us-central1 base region
Official Cloud TPU 1-year commitment price per chip-hour, v5e
Official Cloud TPU DWS Flex-start price per chip-hour, v5e (used as spot/preemptible reference)

tdp.note: Google has released only performance data for TPU v5e/v5p, no power consumption or TDP data (IEA 4E, EDNA server-efficiency study). Electricity sub-term omitted.
